commands.title: Architecture Policies
commands.prompt: What are the architecture policies for LKAB projects?

pages.title: LKAB Architecture Policies
pages.content:
1. Modularity: Design systems in modular components to enhance maintainability and scalability.
2. Scalability: Ensure that the architecture can handle growth in users, data, and functionality without significant performance degradation.
3. Security: Implement robust security measures to protect data and ensure compliance with industry standards.
4. Performance: Optimize for fast response times and efficient resource usage.
5. Maintainability: Write clean, well-documented code to facilitate easy maintenance and updates.
6. Testability: Design for testability by enabling unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing.
7. Resilience: Build systems that can recover gracefully from failures and continue to operate under adverse conditions.

pages.title: Scalability
pages.content: Ensure that the architecture can handle growth in users, data, and functionality without significant performance degradation.

pages.title: Resilience
pages.content: Build systems that can recover gracefully from failures and continue to operate under adverse conditions.
